command:
echo '=== GIT STATE vm-claude-hub ==='
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git fetch origin 2>/dev/null
git status --short
git log --oneline -4
git branch -v | head -5
echo "Gitea HEAD: $(git rev-parse origin/main)"
echo "Local HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD)"

echo '=== GIT STATE vm-memory (via SSH) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 '
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git log --oneline -3
git status --short | head -5
git rev-parse HEAD
' 2>&1

echo '=== GMAIL BRIDGE ADAPTER ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 '
echo "binary: $(ls -la /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND)"
echo "sha256: $(sha256sum /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge 2>/dev/null | cut -d" " -f1)"
echo "config: $(cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-gmail-bridge/config.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("v"+d.get("version","?"),"actions:",len(d.get("allowed_actions",{})))" 2>/dev/null)"
ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/ 2>/dev/null
echo "db_size: $(ls -la /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/bridge.sqlite3 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$5}")"
ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/results/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/audit/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
' 2>&1

echo '=== CAPABILITIES RESULT ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 '
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/results/chatgpt-20260625-capabilities-002.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("request_id:",d.get("request_id"))
print("status:",d.get("status"))
print("adapter_version:",d.get("adapter_version"))
print("delegator_sha:",d.get("delegator_sha256","")[:16],"...")
" 2>/dev/null
' 2>&1

echo '=== TAKEOVER BASELINE REQUEST STATUS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 '
ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/results/ 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/bridge.sqlite3     "SELECT request_id, action, status, created_at FROM requests ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>/dev/null || echo "sqlite3 not available or schema different"
' 2>&1

echo '=== N8N GMAIL WORKFLOW ==='
python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect("/home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite")
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute("SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity WHERE name LIKE '%Gmail%' OR name LIKE '%gmail%'")
for r in cur.fetchall():
    print(f"  [{r[0]}] {r[1]} active={r[2]}")
conn.close()
"

echo '=== NATS ON vm-ecosystem ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203     "systemctl is-active moreno-nats 2>/dev/null || docker ps --format '{{.Names}} {{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -i nats | head -3" 2>&1

echo '=== RUNTIME REGISTRY ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime_registry.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -40" 2>&1

echo DONE_1988
